news.title: Assessing Rockwool (CPSE:ROCK B) Valuation After 2026 Outlook Upgrade And Higher Investment Plans
news.summary: Rockwool (CPSE:ROCK B) raised its 2026 revenue growth outlook to 3% to 6% and plans higher investments, after reporting improving volume demand since March and maintaining an EBIT margin target of 13% to 14%. See our latest analysis for Rockwool. Rockwool’s updated 2026 guidance and higher investment plans come after a mixed share price run. The stock is at DKK193.0, with a 30 day share price retu

news.title: ROCKWOOL opjusterer forventningerne til omsætningsvækst og investeringer for hele året 2026
